ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block within the experiment */,
  "stimulation_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stimulation condition */,
  "choice" INTEGER /* Choice made by the participant */,
  "payout" INTEGER /* Payout received by the participant */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was conducted */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_payout FOREIGN KEY ("payout") REFERENCES payouts ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_choice FOREIGN KEY ("choice") REFERENCES choices ("choice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_stimulation_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulation_condition_id") REFERENCES stimulation_conditions ("stimulation_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_reaction_time FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_time") REFERENCES reaction_times ("reaction_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block within the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the block (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulation_conditions" (
  "stimulation_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulation condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulation condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulation condition */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the stimulation condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulation_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice */,
  "choice_name" TEXT /* Name of the choice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the choice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the choice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the choice was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout */,
  "payout_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payout */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payout */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the payout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payout was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "reaction_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time */,
  "reaction_time_value" REAL /* Value of the reaction time */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the reaction time entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reaction time was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the participant entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_participants" (
  "trial_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the participant's performance */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the trial participant entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial participant entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user permission mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
